name: whatsapp-relay
description: Link a local WhatsApp account to Codex, manage chats, and control Codex from allowed WhatsApp numbers.

interface.longDescription: Link a local WhatsApp account to Codex with a QR code, inspect chats and send messages through MCP, and optionally turn an allowed direct chat into a persistent Codex session over codex app-server.
defaultPrompt: Link my WhatsApp account and verify the auth status
Show my recent WhatsApp chats and unread conversations
Send a WhatsApp message to a contact or group from Codex
Allow my phone number and start WhatsApp Relay so I can control Codex from WhatsApp
